S

save(F, BindingResult) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseCtl
Saves or updates a record based on the submitted form data.
save(T, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseServiceImpl
Saves a DTO record by either adding a new record or updating an existing one, within a required transaction.
save(T, UserContext) - Method in interface com.rays.common.BaseServiceInt
Saves a DTO record by either adding a new record or updating an existing one.
search(F, int) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseCtl
Searches for records matching the given form criteria with pagination support.
search(T, int, int, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl
Searches for DTO records matching the given criteria with pagination support.

Searches for DTO records matching the given criteria with pagination support.
search(T, int, int, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseServiceImpl
Searches for DTO records matching the given criteria with pagination support, in a read-only transaction.

Searches for DTO records matching the given criteria with pagination support.
search(T, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl
Searches for all DTO records matching the given criteria without pagination.

Searches for all DTO records matching the given criteria without pagination.
search(T, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseServiceImpl
Searches for all DTO records matching the given criteria without pagination, in a read-only transaction.
